subject: Charged twice for my order
message: Hi, I just noticed my card was charged twice for order #58291. Can you please refund the extra charge? This is really frustrating.

subject: Where is my package?
message: I ordered a jacket 12 days ago and the tracking still says 'label created'. It was supposed to arrive last week. Can someone check what's going on?

subject: Can't log into my account
message: I've tried resetting my password three times but I never get the email. My account is now locked and I need to place an urgent order today.

subject: App crashes every time I open it
message: Ever since the last update, the app crashes immediately on launch. I'm on an iPhone 14, iOS 17.5. I've tried restarting my phone already.

subject: Want to return a shirt
message: I bought the wrong size shirt last week, order #61042. It's unused and still has tags. How do I exchange it for a large?

subject: Refund request
message: I'd like to cancel my subscription and get a refund. I only signed up 3 days ago and haven't really used it.

subject: This is unacceptable, I want a manager
message: This is the THIRD time I'm contacting you about my missing refund of $340 from order #59102. It's been over a month. I am extremely upset and considering legal action if this isn't resolved today.

subject: Error code when checking out
message: I keep getting ERR_5023 when I try to pay with my credit card. I've tried twice and both times my bank shows a pending charge that then disappears.

subject: Wrong item delivered
message: I ordered a blue backpack but received a red one instead. Order number is #60355. Can you send the correct one or refund me?

subject: 2FA code not arriving
message: I'm trying to log in but the SMS verification code never arrives. I've requested it 5 times now. My phone number on file should be correct.

subject: General question about your products
message: Do your jackets come in petite sizes? I couldn't find that info on the product page.

subject: Package marked delivered but not received
message: The tracking says my order was delivered yesterday at 2pm but I never got anything, and I was home all day. Order #62210.
